title: Implement a progress bar within the GANTT view
excerpt:
Hi Monday team. 
The GANTT view is very helpful but it’s missing a standard functionality a lot of other project management software tools offer. That is a progress bar. Super important for project managers to see visual…

posts.author: a_zinman (Adam Zinman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday team.

The GANTT view is very helpful but it’s missing a standard functionality a lot of other project management software tools offer. That is a progress bar. Super important for project managers to see visually in the GANTT is the current progress of tasks. Especially ones that progress over several days/weeks/months.

I currently have a progress and formula column in my project boards to track the indivudual progress of each task. However I need to see this at a higher level within the GANTT to give me an overall visual perspective.

It would be great to use a formula/number/progress column within the GANTT view to show the progress of a task.

Thanks in advance.
